title: sida saraviae
intro: Sida saraviae, also known as the wild cotton or cotton thorn, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Sida saraviae is often used to make infusions, teas, and topical creams, and its roots and leaves are dried and ground into powders for medicinal purposes.
